Description: Scan the flat trip root and classify each top-level file before any moves happen.

Stories.StoryDescription: Enumerate top-level files from the selected trip root while skipping managed folders and nested directories.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The scanner returns a deterministic list of top-level files and ignores managed folders.

Stories.StoryDescription: Classify each discovered file as supported photo, non-photo artifact, or unsupported item using extension rules.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each inventory item has a deterministic initial classification.

Stories.StoryDescription: Recognize JPG, JPEG, PNG, and HEIC as photos, and MOV or AAE as non-photo artifacts.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Initial format support matches the configured extension lists.

Stories.StoryDescription: Return inventory records with absolute path, normalized extension, size, and initial classification.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Inventory records expose the normalized metadata needed by downstream modules.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add unit tests covering mixed file types, extension casing, and managed-folder skipping.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover mixed media, casing behavior, and managed-folder skipping.
